title: Potent Flaky Korean Uruguayan Rest Meat Empanadas
description: A nutty and energizing Uruguayan dish featuring doenjang and rest meat, wrapped in a gluten-free friendly flaky crust. This empanada is perfect for a snack or lunch.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the gluten-free flour and salt.
Add the cold unsalted butter and use a pastry blender to work it into the flour until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
In a small bowl, whisk together the egg and sesame oil.
Add the egg mixture to the flour mixture and stir until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place 1 tablespoon of doenjang and 1 tablespoon of rest meat in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough in half and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little bit of sesame oil.
Bake the empanadas for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
